processSteps.title: Book a Free Consult
processSteps.body: Pick a time online or call. We come to you — no showroom hassle.

processSteps.title: Measure & Design
processSteps.body: Our expert measures every window and helps you pick the perfect product.

processSteps.title: Custom Fabrication
processSteps.body: Your treatments are made to spec and delivered in 2–3 weeks.

processSteps.title: Professional Install
processSteps.body: We hang everything, clean up, and make sure you love the result.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Ben's Blinds transformed our bay windows. The cellular shades are gorgeous and our heating bill dropped noticeably.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.text: Called on a Tuesday, had measurements Thursday, blinds installed the following week. Absolute pros.

reviews.name: Rita L.
reviews.text: Best decision I made for my condo. The motorized shades work flawlessly with HomeKit. 10/10 recommend.

ctaHeadline: Ready for New Windows That Work for Chicago?
ctaBody: Book a free in-home consultation. We measure, design, and install: you just enjoy the view.
